---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new SaaS UI skill
title: "[skill] <short name>"
labels: skill-request
---

## Skill name

A short, kebab-case name (e.g. `command-palette`).

## What problem does it solve?

Describe the recurring SaaS UI task an agent struggles with today (a component,
a flow, an accessibility gap, a state it forgets to handle).

## When should an agent use it?

The trigger conditions (this becomes the `description: Use when ...` line).

## Key contents you'd expect

- Workflow / decision steps
- Concrete React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui patterns
- Accessibility requirements
- Common pitfalls to avoid

## References (optional)

Docs, design systems, or examples that should inform the skill.
